recommendations.title: Son of Frankenstein
recommendations.overview: One of the sons of late Dr. Henry Frankenstein finds his father's ghoulish creation in a coma and revives him, only to find out the monster is controlled by Ygor who is bent on revenge.

recommendations.title: Tau
recommendations.overview: Held captive in a futuristic smart house, a woman hopes to escape by befriending the A.I. program that controls the house.

recommendations.title: Let's Be Evil
recommendations.overview: A woman enters an underground bunker where gifted children use augmented reality technology to wreak havoc.

recommendations.title: Offender
recommendations.overview: Justice needs to be served at Britain's most notorious young offenders institute.

recommendations.title: The Institute
recommendations.overview: In 19th century Baltimore, Isabel Porter, a girl stricken with grief from her parents' untimely death, voluntarily checks herself into the Rosewood Institute. Subjected to bizarre and increasingly violent pseudo-scientific experiments in personality

recommendations.title: The Atticus Institute
recommendations.overview: In the early 1970s, Dr. Henry West creates an institute to find people with supernatural abilities. When Judith Winstead comes to the facility, she exhibits amazing abilities that the military wants to turn into a weapon.

recommendations.title: Elephant Song
recommendations.overview: A psychiatrist is drawn into a complex mind game when he questions a disturbed patient about the disappearance of a colleague.

recommendations.title: Return
recommendations.overview: A girl is at school. Suddenly it's as if she can't breathe. As she runs down the stairs we follow her into her mind. It takes us deep into dark woods.

recommendations.title: Burnt Offerings
recommendations.overview: A family moves into a large old mansion in the countryside which seems to have a mysterious and sinister power over its new residents.

recommendations.title: Shut In
recommendations.overview: A young single mother is held captive along with her two children by a violent ex and must plot their escape before it’s too late.
